name: Oyster Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 pint oysters, shucked, drained & patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine oysters with soy sauce, cornstarch, sherry, ginger, green onion, and sesame oil.
2. Spray a large skillet with nonstick vegetable spray. Heat vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
3. Add the oyster mixture to the skillet and stir-fry for 3 minutes or until the oysters are just cooked and edges curl.
4. Set aside; add red pepper to the skillet. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Return the oysters to the skillet.
6. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch, lemon juice, and chicken broth. Whisk over medium heat until thickened.
7. Stir in lemon peel, red pepper flakes, and honey; let cool.
8. To serve, arrange bok choy leaves in a serving bowl. Pour the oyster mixture into the bowl and top with lemon sauce. Serve at room temperature.
